text:
File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 1 = Payment/allowed amount is not determined at the individual line level (e.g., DRG or outpatient 
 PPS) 
2 = Payment/allowed amount is determined at the individual line level (e.g., RBRVS) and when 
applicable, cost-sharing and/or coordination of benefits were deducted from one or more specific 
line-level payment/allowed amount(s) 
3 = Payment/allowed amount is determined for each individual line (e.g., RBRVS)
